creator: cpiazza@home.net
text:
On Thu, Sep 16, 1999 at 11:33:08AM -0400, Seth wrote:
 > 
 > ports from 9/15/1999
 > 
 <snip>
 
 > a+rx: not found
 
 This is ${CHMOD} a+rx in the ports Makefile.  Could you 
 send the output of `ident /usr/ports/Mk/bsd.port.mk`?  If
 it's less than revision 1.316 you need to update ports-base
 too.
 
 -Chris
